title: Record abs130k, handoff 0.58, and 14k/400 tool budgets

fixtureActions.content:
# Abs130 Handoff58 Tool14k Contract

## Abs 130k
full compaction absolute soft trigger defaults to 130k tokens so long sessions reclaim earlier on large windows

## Handoff 58
UltraSwarm pre-handoff compaction targets 0.58 usage so swarm launches start with denser free headroom

## Tool 14k
tool-result budgets trim at 14k chars with 400-char previews for denser long-horizon context

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool vitest
